description: A scientist needs to plan the weekly operations for a science instrument on an orbiting satellite.

nodes.task_description: Identify the scientific targets for the upcoming week.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent lists the desired observation targets.

nodes.task_description: Check the satellite's orbital track to determine when it will be over the desired targets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of observation opportunities.

nodes.task_description: Create a command sequence to power on the instrument, point it at the target, and collect data during the scheduled opportunities.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a detailed command plan for the week's scientific operations.
